title: rubus axillaris
intro: Rubus axillaris, also known as the Thimbleberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to western North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus axillaris include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thimbleberry include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate digestive issues due to its high fiber content and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus axillaris include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
